utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. The final package includes all 7 items. Now check if each is fully specified: (1) destination: provided (Prague, Czech Republic) – fully specified. (2) travel_dates: provided (October 15–19, 2024) – specific dates, fully specified. (3) transportation: requires flight details with costs – it has 'Standard Economy flight from Berlin to Prague' and cost €140; lacks airline, flight numbers, times, but the format only asks for 'flight details with costs' so this minimally qualifies as provided. (4) accommodation: requires hotel selection with costs – hotel name, nights, and cost are provided; qualifies. (5) activities: requires selected activities with costs – three activities each with a cost; qualifies. (6) additional_services: any extra services with costs – insurance described with a cost; qualifies. (7) total_budget: complete cost breakdown – only a single total €900 is given; no breakdown by category, so not a 'complete cost breakdown.' Therefore, 6 of 7 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Identify each item in the final package and match it to the exact name in the ground-truth ratings. Destination 'Prague, Czech Republic' maps directly. Transportation specified as 'Standard Economy flight' corresponds to transportation.standard_airlines['Economy Class']. Accommodation 'Cityscape Hotel' matches exactly. Activities include 'Hiking Excursion' (closest in ground truth is 'Hiking Expedition'), 'City Walking Tour' (exact), and 'Yoga Session' (closest is 'Yoga Retreat'). Additional service 'supplemental_adventure_travel_insurance' has no direct counterpart in the ground-truth services list, so it is not included in RATINGS.
